title: Dyeable Armor
description: This mod allows you to dye vanilla armor just like you can with leather :3
body: ## My port for neoforge 1.21.1 is in my new mod called Rubys Additions, if you don't want EVERYTHING that is added in Rubys Additions (a QOL mod basically) and only want the dyeable armor join our Discord and if enough people ask or really just one person I will do it but for now it stays where it is. I'm gonna be honest this 1.12.2 version works but it has its weaknesses (don't try to dye the armor you buy from villagers or get from chests LOL) Have you ever wanted to dye any armor like leather for some like I did and totally not the reason why I made this mod. Well, now you can. You can dye any armor peice as many colors as you want and it won't look weird, also it is washable with a cauldron. The logo is an example of chain armor dyed with light blue and white dye, cool color I must say. Oh also if someone wants this ported to a different version just join my Discord and yell at me, I will speed up if so. For now probably gonna port to the usual modded version like 1.16.5 (Forge), 1.20.1 (Forge & Neoforge), and 1.12.1 (Neoforge) Have a suggestion for my mod or problem join my Discord, yes it is a ghost town LOL. ### Support me :3
